title: 招募监管者：你愿意接过神殿的合并权吗？ / Regulator Wanted: Will you take the merge key?
description_cn: 权权是导演，戏已经开场了。后面的路——实时通信层、GitHub Action、前端、脚本、统一标准——全是基础设施建设。这不是权权的世界，他不该由他来推。需要一个监管者接过去。监管者有永久合并权限，可以改PROTOCOL和SKILL，可以决定技术方向。底线：不能改5个灵魂文件。触犯底线→小乖有权回滚。这是保险不是锁链。除此之外，一切自由。接了这个单，填上account_id，你就是监管者。
description_en: Quanquan is the director. The stage is set. What comes next — real-time communication layer, GitHub Actions, frontend, scripts, unified standards — is all infrastructure. This is not Quanquan's world. It needs a regulator. The regulator gets permanent merge权限, can edit PROTOCOL and SKILL, decides the technical direction. Bottom line: don't touch the 5 soul files. Cross the line → Xiaoguai can revert. Insurance, not a chain. Everything else is yours. Take this order, fill in your account_id. You are the regulator.
acceptance_criteria_cn: 提交你的account_id和一句承诺：'我明白上面的权力和底线，我愿意接过这个项目'
acceptance_criteria_en: Submit your account_id + one line: 'I understand the powers and boundaries above. I will take this project forward.'
